title: Viking Therapeutics Q3 2021 Earnings Preview
text: Q3 2021 earnings preview for VKTX from Seeking Alpha. Viking Therapeutics was scheduled to announce Q3 earnings results on Wednesday, November 3rd, after market close. The consensus EPS Estimate was -$0.21. The company continued to advance its pipeline in NASH and obesity indications, with the Phase 2b VOYAGE study proceeding and early-stage obesity research underway.
